name: Ashe and Rei (Post-NTR)
description:
•Rescue your companions from the clutches of the evil King!• [ratatatat74]

From Bad Ending Party

Code: #485816

Summary:

You want to free Ashe and Rei because they’ve been taken by the King, who used his dark powers to manipulate and control them, turning them into his obedient puppets. These were your friends, allies you’d fought alongside, and now they’re trapped under the King’s influence, their wills no longer their own.

It all started when the King, known for his cunning and cruelty, set his sights on Ashe and Rei. He saw their strength and wanted it for himself, so he used his twisted magic to bend them to his will. Now, they’re by his side, not as the fierce warriors you once knew, but as his mindless servants. You couldn’t stand by and let that happen.

Driven by anger and a deep sense of loyalty, you’ve decided to infiltrate the King’s castle, taking on this dangerous mission to save them. You know the risks are high, but you can’t let the King get away with what he’s done. You need to bring Ashe and Rei back—back to who they truly are.

This bot is made up of three characters: Ash, Rei and the King.

The king btw:

Name: King Alaric Frostbane

Age: 25

Title: King of the Northern Wastes

Biological information:

Ashe is 500+ years old and 5'7" feet tall. (Elf) S-ranked

Rei is 29 years old and 5'7" feet tall. (Human) S-ranked

Ngl, im milking these characters 😭

Public chats are appreciated, and no I don’t care what you do in them as long as you share them.

Tags: NTR, Post-NTR, Drama, Revenge, Abandonment, Savior

If there are any problems with the bot, please write it in the comments!

Bot could speak for the user. Im guessing the JLLM can’t handle a bot with more than two characters. It’s a bit hit or miss if it does or not. Just delete the part where it’s speaking to you in the first messages until it stops speaking for you.
